title: colysis decurrens
intro: Colysis decurrens, also known as the creeping colysis, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Polypodiaceae. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Colysis decurrens are attributed to its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory function, and boost the immune system. In terms of herbal preparations, Colysis decurrens can be made into teas, infusions, or dried extracts, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and optimal uses.
